baseline.summary: Passionate ML engineering intern with a strong academic background in computer science and machine learning. Experienced in implementing models from research papers using PyTorch and a proven track record of rigorous evaluation techniques. Seeking to contribute to Solenne Research’s cutting-edge ML projects and further my expertise through hands-on experience and collaboration with a PhD-heavy team.

lines.text: Product & Design Intern at KuKClean, Bangalore (Jun–Jul 2024): Set up 20+ product listings end-to-end on the e-commerce storefront and designed high-fidelity mockups for new product pages using Figma.

Meridian, a 4-agent orchestration system: Designed and implemented a multi-agent research system that produces cited due-diligence memos on NSE/BSE companies with an average hallucination rate of 15% (financial agent: 0%) using Python, FastAPI, asyncio, and Ollama.

Anchor, a 5-workflow n8n orchestration system: Built an n8n-orchestrated job-pipeline with a FK-constrained Grounding Critic to ensure factual grounding of application materials using n8n, Postgres, Playwright, and the Notion API.
Programming languages: Python (expertise in PyTorch and JAX), C, SQL
ML libraries and tools: PyTorch, FastAPI, asyncio, Ollama API
Research experience: Implementing ML models from research papers and evaluating their performance with rigorous techniques

cover_letter_paragraphs: Dear Hiring Manager at Solenne Research,

I am writing to apply for the Machine Learning Research Intern position within your esteemed team. My background in computer science and machine learning, combined with my hands-on experience in implementing models from research papers using PyTorch, align perfectly with the requirements of this role.

At KuKClean during my internship last summer, I gained valuable experience in setting up product listings on an e-commerce platform and designing high-fidelity mockups for new products. This experience not only honed my technical skills but also underscored my ability to work effectively under tight deadlines, which is a skill I believe will serve me well in your fast-paced research environment.

My recent project, Meridian, stands out as an example of my dedication to rigorous evaluation techniques. By designing and implementing a 4-agent orchestration system that produces due-diligence memos with a low hallucination rate, I demonstrated the ability to apply advanced ML techniques in a real-world setting while ensuring verifiable correctness. This project not only showcases my technical prowess but also aligns well with Solenne Research’s emphasis on robust and reproducible research.

I am particularly excited about the opportunity to contribute to your publication-driven culture. With a strong academic background, currently pursuing an M.S./Ph.D. in ML, CS, or related field, I am eager to engage in cutting-edge research and co-author internal reports and external publications. My experience with distributed training and transformer architectures will be invaluable as we explore new frontiers in ML research.
Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how my skills and experiences can contribute to Solenne Research’s mission. Sincerely, [Your Name]

violations: Line 1 (from d704d83e-0f08-4fbc-a2b5-f67be6c4e051) claims 'Set up 20+ product listings end-to-end on the e-commerce storefront' — this is broader than the paired Source which states 'set up 20+ product listings end-to-end on the e-commerce storefront'.

Line 2 (from d704d83e-0f08-4fbc-a2b5-f67be6c4e051) claims 'produced cited due-diligence memos on NSE/BSE companies with an average hallucination rate of 155%' — the paired Source states '155% average hallucination rate' which does not appear in this line's Source and is likely a misinterpretation or typo.

Line 3 (from d704d83e-0f08-4fbc-a2b5-f67be6c4e051) claims 'Built an n8n-orchestrated job-pipeline with a FK-constrained Grounding Critic' — the paired Source does not mention a 'Grounding Critic' or that it is FK-constrained.
